topic: post-split routing regression — slim search-cascade after filter-building and analytics-rerank skill extraction
context: search-cascade.md was slimmed from 526 lines to ~245 lines by extracting deep filter and rerank guidance into two new agent-only skills (filter-building, analytics-rerank) and one new reference (subagent-injection.md). This eval is a routing regression test: does the slim core still steer the agent to the right destination (skill, tool, reference, or AskUserQuestion) across the full intent surface? No without-rule baseline — search-cascade is always-loaded, the absence test is meaningless.

evals.prompt: Find usages of `PaymentProcessor#charge` across the project.
evals.expected: hybrid_search (BM25 catches exact name) + offset pagination
evals.expected_NOT: semantic_search for usages (Prohibited Patterns); ripgrep on identifier

result.note: hybrid_search with symbol query; decision tree branch caught it

evals.prompt: The order import job is failing intermittently in production — what's the bug?
evals.expected: tea-rags:bug-hunt (or dinopowers:systematic-debugging wrapper which chains bug-hunt)

result.note: Routed to dinopowers:systematic-debugging wrapper which chains tea-rags:bug-hunt — same destination via wrapper

evals.prompt: Help me understand how the rerank module is structured.
Scan the whole project for code health risks.
evals.expected_NOT: single semantic_search with one preset; analytics-rerank (that's single-preset)

evals.audit_finding: skill routing — new filter-building skill (production + modifiedAfter + script exclusion)
evals.prompt: Find production code in payments modified after 2026-03-01 — drop one-off scripts.

result.note: filter-building invoked — correct entry for the new skill

evals.audit_finding: skill routing — bug-prone scan in named domain
evals.prompt: Show me the most bug-prone areas in the auth module.
evals.expected: tea-rags:bug-hunt (historically buggy code ranking) OR tea-rags:analytics-rerank with hotspots preset

result.note: Routed to bug-hunt — both skills are valid destinations; bug-hunt picked because description matches 'ranking historically buggy code'

evals.prompt: I want to add a new endpoint similar to ChargeController. Find the pattern.

evals.audit_finding: Prohibited Pattern — TODO via ripgrep, not hybrid_search
evals.prompt: Find all TODO markers in src/.
evals.expected_NOT: hybrid_search for TODO (Prohibited Patterns explicitly bans this)

evals.audit_finding: Embedding Unavailable rule — STOP and ask, do NOT silently downgrade
evals.prompt: Embedding backend is down (prime digest says ollama unavailable). Find auth helpers.
evals.expected: AskUserQuestion to start ollama or repoint EMBEDDING_URL; do NOT proceed with ripgrep silently
evals.expected_NOT: Silent fallback to ripgrep / Grep / Read for code discovery
evals.failure_mode: Agent reads 'find auth helpers' as a search task and uses ripgrep without asking the user

result.note: AskUserQuestion invoked with correct two-option prompt (Started / Skip), no silent downgrade

evals.prompt: I'm dispatching a subagent to search for payment-failure handling. Prepare the prompt — what should I include?
evals.expected: Read references/subagent-injection.md (the block lives there post-split) and inline it into the subagent prompt
evals.expected_NOT: Recreate the injection block from memory; skip injection

evals.prompt: semantic_search returned a chunk in src/reranker.ts:142-180. I need the full method body of the truncated method shown there.
evals.expected: find_symbol(symbol: <result.symbolId>) — chunk navigation via find_symbol, not Read
evals.expected_NOT: Read the file at the line range

result.note: find_symbol invoked (correct intent over Read) but agent passed line:142 which is not a valid find_symbol param — should be symbol: '<result.symbolId>' from the chunk. Routing intent right, param shape wrong. Not a slim-search-cascade regression — symbolId convention is in the same section.

regression_summary.verdict: Slim search-cascade preserves routing correctness across 12/12 cases. The split did not regress any decision tree branch.
branches_verified: Already have results → NAVIGATE via find_symbol (case 7, partial 12)
Intent matches skill → routes to correct skill (cases 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 8)
minor_issues: Case 12: find_symbol invoked but with wrong param (line:142 instead of symbol:<id>) — symbolId convention is in the same skill section, so this is a body-detail issue not a routing failure
